summary: Hydrated state shows the hinted representative #42218 is already closed. The live work splits into broad inbound Feishu interactive-card parsing (#41609/#56795) and narrower post-format/text-tag/nested-array parsing (#60380/#60383/#73203). No close, merge, or fix action is safe in this dedupe-only job because the open PRs have failing checks and/or unresolved review evidence.
